name: notes4chris
description: Privacy-focused dual-track meeting recorder with AI transcription and speaker-aware summarisation

scripts.build:sck: cd native/sck-audio-capture && swift build -c release && codesign -f -s - --identifier com.christopherrobinson.sck-audio-capture .build/release/sck-audio-capture
scripts.build:calendar: cd native/calendar-helper && swift build -c release -Xlinker -sectcreate -Xlinker __TEXT -Xlinker __info_plist -Xlinker "$PWD/Info.plist" && codesign -f -s - --entitlements CalendarHelper.entitlements --identifier com.christopherrobinson.calendar-helper .build/release/calendar-helper
scripts.build:native: npm run build:sck && npm run build:calendar

author: Christopher Robinson

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Notes4Chris needs microphone access to record your voice during meetings.
extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: Notes4Chris needs Screen Recording permission to capture system audio during meetings.
extendInfo.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Notes4Chris reads your calendar to suggest note-taking before meetings start and enrich the in-meeting banner with title, attendees, and agenda.
extendInfo.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Notes4Chris reads your calendar to suggest note-taking before meetings start and enrich the in-meeting banner with title, attendees, and agenda.
